---
title: "Mary Woollcombe"
---

## Mary Woollcombe

**Dates:** (1845-1930)

**Maiden name:** (Walter)

### Description

sister of Gertrude Walter and of Frances (Walter) Yonge

### Biography

She \'turned 25 in 1870\', and married (1871) Major Robert Woollcombe (1835-1920).

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 15 th [1900?]
- Letter from Oct 5 th 1900
- [To Mary Yonge, July 1st[1899]](../letters/3409_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from May 13th [1897]
- Letter from May 3d [1897]
- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from Aug 25 [1883]
- Letter from March 20th 1876
- Letter from March 7th 1876 [6 March 1876]
- Letter from Sept 13th [1871]
- Letter from Jan 31st  [1870]
- Letter from Jany 4th [1870]
- Letter from October 5, 1868

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
